lines: My boy watched them drag the girls east. He hasn't spoken since. Bring your sister back, Kenji. Bring them all back.
They came at dusk. Masakado's banner, but bandit manners. What kind of lord flies a flag over arson?
You broke the Chief's band? Then there is justice left in this province. A spoonful, anyway.
When I grow up I'll have a sword too!
Mister, your sword is bigger than me. That's so unfair.
The crossroads shrine heals the body and remembers the soul. Rest there, ronin — the roads only get redder from here.
The sky above the shrine... I have walked this province forty years and the sky has never had a SEAM before.
